data.content: Plan complete for foolery-3bcc. Root cause: Tabs component in settings-sheet.tsx uses h-full which, combined with default min-height:auto and the tall pools section in advanced mode, pushes the Save/Reset footer outside the overflow-hidden boundary. Fix: change Tabs className from "flex flex-col h-full" to "flex flex-col flex-1 min-h-0" and add shrink-0 to the footer elements. Single file change, low risk.
